title: GutterAid Local Patterns Configuration
description: Local configuration file for GutterAid task patterns that extends/overrides base patterns

version.description: Version of gutteraid that this configuration was written for. Should probably match the base patterns version.

matchers.description: Array of task matchers that define file patterns, task patterns, and scripts to run. Can override base matchers with the same filePattern.

inputs.description: Optional array of input definitions for task scripts. Can override base inputs with the same id.
